thesis: An optic is a stable domain projection of the ten ProcessLang operators. The operator remains invariant; the domain changes the reading.

lenses.Addiction: addiction as a self-reinforcing process program where agency loses ☳ to compulsive ☲
lenses.ADHD: ADHD as an attention and executive-function regulation profile
lenses.Agency: agency as the capacity to originate action, choose, and accept consequence
lenses.Biology: living systems as process bodies with metabolism, regulation, memory, aging, and irreversible fate
lenses.Chemistry: chemical reactions as transformations of matter and energy under constraints
lenses.Code: software as formalized process, execution, state, architecture, debugging, and deployment
lenses.Crypto: cryptography as trust, verification, secrecy, integrity, and protocol execution
lenses.DissipativeMath: mathematics as sustained costly structure rather than timeless platonic object
lenses.Economics: economics as exchange, scarcity, incentives, cycles, and institutional runtime
lenses.Electricity: electric systems as charge, field, circuit, signal, and power flow
lenses.HarmonicFlow: music as movement through time, resonance, repetition, rule, and performed sound
lenses.InstitutionalEducation: mass education as institutional selection, standardization, social reproduction, and deagency
lenses.KabbalahIching: Kabbalah and I Ching as symbolic process topology of emanation and change
lenses.Math: classical mathematics as formal structure, proof, abstraction, computation, and model
lenses.Opics: optical engineering and photonics as control of light, modes, media, detection, and image formation
lenses.Pedagogy: teaching and learning as transformation of understanding through relation, method, feedback, and practice
lenses.Psychology: psyche as cognition, affect, behavior, learning, self-observation, and social influence
lenses.Psychopathology: mental disorder as disrupted process pattern across symptom, body, relation, and runtime
lenses.Quantum: quantum systems as state evolution, entanglement, measurement, probability, and manifestation
lenses.Sociology: society as structure, institution, norm, power, reproduction, and collective change
lenses.Training: machine learning as behavior formation through data, gradients, loss, reinforcement, and deployment

▽.Addiction: dopamine and neurotransmitter flow, movement toward the addictive object, stream of impulse and craving
▽.ADHD: unstable attention flow, racing thought, motor activity, impulsive action
▽.Agency: inner energy, intention, will, and accepted consequence moving outward from the acting source
▽.Biology: nutrients, ATP, hormones, and signaling molecules moving through living systems
▽.Chemistry: matter and energy moving through reaction, diffusion, reactor flow, and charge transfer
▽.Code: control flow, data flow, message passing, and history of changes
▽.Crypto: encrypted data flow, key exchange, and plaintext movement through protected memory
▽.DissipativeMath: computational or cognitive attention required to keep mathematical objects active
▽.Economics: movement of goods, services, money, capital, information, and financial liquidity
▽.Electricity: electric current, charge motion, and electromagnetic energy transfer
▽.HarmonicFlow: movement through musical time, phrase progression, and temporal sound flow
▽.InstitutionalEducation: student cohorts, funding, staff, resources, and sanctioned knowledge moving through the institution
▽.KabbalahIching: emanation, qi, and consciousness moving through symbolic paths of transformation
▽.Math: deductive movement, graph traversal, transformations, and information flow in computation
▽.Opics: light rays, wavefronts, photon streams, and optical signal propagation
▽.Pedagogy: knowledge, skill, attention, and motivation moving between teacher, learner, and environment
▽.Psychology: stream of consciousness, emotion, behavior sequence, and cognitive information flow
▽.Psychopathology: disrupted thought flow, affective instability, disorganized behavior, and intrusive ideation
▽.Quantum: wavefunction evolution, probability current, state propagation, and quantum walk
▽.Sociology: information, migration, capital, innovation, and social movement spreading through society
▽.Training: training data, gradient flow, and continuous update signal through a model

☰.Addiction: stimulus-reward association, strengthened neural pathway, and emotional attachment to the addictive object
☰.ADHD: creative but unstable association between ideas, hyperfocus coupling, and weak linkage to distant consequences
☰.Agency: relations formed from authorship, recognition of other agency, and owned links between choice and consequence
☰.Biology: synapse, receptor-ligand binding, and intercellular signaling
☰.Chemistry: chemical bond formation, coordination, hydrogen bonding, and donor-acceptor interaction
☰.Code: module binding through APIs, dependency injection, network connection, and component coupling
☰.Crypto: secure channel establishment, plaintext-ciphertext-key binding, and hash-data association
☰.DissipativeMath: relations between concepts, theorems, proofs, and mutually sustaining mathematical truths
☰.Economics: market relation, contract, financial instrument, trade agreement, and network effect
☰.Electricity: closed circuit, component connection, magnetic coupling, and switch contact
☰.HarmonicFlow: harmonic relation, voice leading, and melodic linkage
☰.InstitutionalEducation: professional and social networks, status linkage, and integration into hierarchy
☰.KabbalahIching: paths between sephirot, changing lines between hexagrams, and symbolic correspondence
☰.Math: isomorphism, function, theorem link, category, and morphism
☰.Opics: mode coupling, optical component joining, fiber splice, and cavity resonance
☰.Pedagogy: new knowledge linked to prior experience, teacher-learner relation, and learning community formation
☰.Psychology: association, attachment, synaptic plasticity, and integration of experience into self
☰.Psychopathology: pathological association, fixation, phobic network, traumatic linkage, and delusional relation
☰.Quantum: entanglement, coherent superposition, tunneling, and interaction by exchanged virtual particles
☰.Sociology: social network formation, norm creation, institution building, group formation, and interpersonal tie
☰.Training: attention, weight matrices as encoded relations, and corpus-driven association

☷.Addiction: detox, withdrawal, weakened reinforcement pathway, and cognitive distancing
☷.ADHD: collapse of concentration, forgetting, interrupted action, loss of interest, and boredom dissociation
☷.Agency: discarding false identities, imposed roles, fear barriers, and actions misaligned with principle
☷.Biology: apoptosis, protein degradation, catabolism, and biological breakdown
☷.Chemistry: bond breaking, dissociation, complex decay, dissolution, and desorption
☷.Code: code deletion, refactoring, garbage collection, decoupling, and process termination
☷.Crypto: key erasure, protocol failure, cryptanalysis, and breakdown under attack
☷.DissipativeMath: decay of unsupported mathematical patterns, obsolete formalism, and idealization under resource limits
☷.Economics: contract termination, bankruptcy, asset devaluation, alliance breakdown, and demonetization
☷.Electricity: open circuit, discharge, heat dissipation, signal attenuation, and energy loss
☷.HarmonicFlow: tension resolution, fade-out, transitional decay, and release
☷.InstitutionalEducation: expulsion, program closure, obsolete curriculum, dissent, and institutional legitimacy loss
☷.KabbalahIching: ego dissolution, old-form collapse, karmic pattern release, and purification through non-form
☷.Math: simplification, factorization, decomposition, reduction, and elimination of reducible elements
☷.Opics: scattering, absorption, attenuation, decoherence, and optical mode decoupling
☷.Pedagogy: forgetting, skill loss, misconception destruction, authority deconstruction, and outdated knowledge removal
☷.Psychology: skill decay, dissociation, therapeutic pattern release, and ego-structure loosening
☷.Psychopathology: personality breakdown, dissociation, symptom extinction, and remission
☷.Quantum: collapse, decoherence, particle decay, and loss of coherence in environment
☷.Sociology: institutional collapse, anomie, community disintegration, tradition loss, and revolutionary destruction
☷.Training: regularization, dropout, weight decay, pruning, and suppression of noise or false correlation

☵.Addiction: engram, ritual schema, justification narrative, and biochemical pattern
☵.ADHD: prefrontal and basal-ganglia patterns, genetic predisposition, procrastination scripts, and novelty-seeking habit
☵.Agency: self-identification as author, goal encoding, personal principle, and promise
☵.Biology: central dogma: DNA to RNA to protein to function
☵.Chemistry: chemical formula, structural formula, reaction equation, energy surface, and electron configuration
☵.Code: source code, bytecode, AST, specification, and documentation
☵.Crypto: ciphertext, hash, digital signature, and cryptographic protocol representation
☵.DissipativeMath: abstraction and formalization into sets, theorems, models, and rules with entropic cost
☵.Economics: price, money unit, contract, GDP, inflation, and other economic indicators
☵.Electricity: circuit diagram, Maxwell equations, waveform, phasor diagram, and component parameters
☵.HarmonicFlow: musical idea represented as notation, MIDI, or abstract structure
☵.InstitutionalEducation: standard, curriculum, schedule, diploma, grade, rank, and hidden curriculum
☵.KabbalahIching: sephirotic number, divine name, attribute, hexagram structure, mandala, and mystical diagram
☵.Math: formula, diagram, axiomatic system, group representation, and model
☵.Opics: amplitude, phase, polarization, hologram, optical spectrum, and wave equation
☵.Pedagogy: curriculum, method, textbook, lecture, assignment, grade, and subject language
☵.Psychology: memory, engram, schema, script, language, and diagnostic category
☵.Psychopathology: diagnostic criteria, neuroimaging pattern, genetic marker, and pathological internal schema
☵.Quantum: wavefunction, density matrix, bra-ket notation, quantum circuit, and Hamiltonian
☵.Sociology: social code, language, symbol, law, ideology, cultural narrative, and demographic statistic
☵.Training: representation learning, embeddings, and weights as compressed memory of a distribution

☳.Addiction: decision to use or abstain, will effort, alternative activity, and compulsive loss of choice
☳.ADHD: difficulty selecting priority, impulsive short-term reward choice, and failure to choose focus deliberately
☳.Agency: conscious volitional selection among alternatives with accepted responsibility for consequences
☳.Biology: differentiation, immune response, and neuronal action potential as irreversible biological selection
☳.Chemistry: reaction pathway selection, kinetic versus thermodynamic control, catalytic selectivity, and stereoselectivity
☳.Code: algorithm, architecture, data structure, branch, and conditional decision
☳.Crypto: algorithm choice, key generation, nonce or IV selection, and proof-of-work decision
☳.DissipativeMath: axiom or proof-method selection under limited resources; choice as costly suppression of alternatives
☳.Economics: consumer, firm, investor, and state decision under scarcity and incentive
☳.Electricity: current path selection, switching, filter frequency choice, and diode directionality
☳.HarmonicFlow: selection of notes, chords, scales, and compositional path
☳.InstitutionalEducation: institutional and career selection, administrative decision, and constrained or illusory student choice
☳.KabbalahIching: path selection on the tree, divination cast, and decision to follow an archetype
☳.Math: axiom system, proof method, computational branch, and element selection
☳.Opics: light path, mode, resonance frequency, and polarization selection
☳.Pedagogy: learner strategy, topic, depth, teacher method, pace, assessment form, and decision to ask or remain silent
☳.Psychology: decision, volition, response selection, attention selection, and moral choice
☳.Psychopathology: impaired volition, compulsion, avoidant choice, and symptom-driven loss of freedom
☳.Quantum: probabilistic measurement outcome, basis selection, and quantum-game decision
☳.Sociology: collective decision, constrained individual choice, voting, and social action strategy
☳.Training: gradient direction, sampling, reinforcement signal, and selection of what to strengthen or suppress

☴.Addiction: self-monitoring, craving awareness, trigger tracking, consequence reflection, and external therapeutic observation
☴.ADHD: self-monitoring, time observation, and often post-factum awareness of distraction
☴.Agency: self-awareness, introspection, motive observation, consequence reading, and responsibility boundary detection
☴.Biology: receptor binding and biological sensing that changes the system
☴.Chemistry: measurement of concentration, pH, spectrum, product detection, and structural visualization
☴.Code: debugging, logging, profiling, runtime monitoring, and code review
☴.Crypto: cryptanalysis, integrity monitoring, signature verification, and protocol audit

☴.Electricity: voltage, current, power, and frequency measurement by oscilloscope or multimeter
☴.HarmonicFlow: active listening, spectral analysis, and pattern recognition
☴.InstitutionalEducation: inspection, statistics, behavior supervision, loyalty monitoring, and institutional research
☴.KabbalahIching: contemplation of the tree, meditation on hexagrams, introspection, and synchronistic observation
☴.Math: invariant study, hypothesis testing, numerical experiment, and visualization
☴.Opics: photodetection, camera capture, spectroscopy, interferometry, and intensity or phase measurement
☴.Pedagogy: testing, examination, teacher observation, learner self-assessment, and question as gap observation
☴.Psychology: introspection, clinical interview, behavioral observation, psychometrics, and neuroimaging
☴.Psychopathology: clinical interview, observation, self-report, psychological testing, and state monitoring
☴.Quantum: projective or weak measurement, interference observation, particle detection, and state tomography
☴.Sociology: survey, observation, data analysis, ethnography, social indicator monitoring, and social reflexivity
☴.Training: loss measurement, evaluation, benchmark, and partial reading where loss is not identical to what was learned

☲.Addiction: craving, use, euphoria, crash, guilt or withdrawal, and renewed craving
☲.ADHD: procrastination-panic, hyperfocus-exhaustion, daily disruption, and impulsive action-regret cycle
☲.Agency: intention, assessment, choice, action, reflection, and repeated responsibility testing
☲.Biology: cell cycle and repeated biological maintenance
☲.Chemistry: catalytic cycle, chain reaction, oscillating reaction, and matter circulation
☲.Code: development cycle, build cycle, event loop, recursion, and repeated deployment
☲.Crypto: encrypt-decrypt cycle, key exchange cycle, blockchain hashing, and hash-function iteration
☲.DissipativeMath: truth support by repeated proof, teaching, use, recursion, induction, and paradigm cycle
☲.Economics: business cycle, production cycle, long economic wave, boom, peak, decline, and trough
☲.Electricity: AC period, capacitor or inductor charge-discharge, generator cycle, and clock signal
☲.HarmonicFlow: repetition, loop, rhythmic cycle, and harmonic sequence
☲.InstitutionalEducation: school year, semester, lesson-homework-test loop, admission-study-graduation-employment, and reform cycle
☲.KabbalahIching: emanation-return cycle, I Ching sequence, seasons, and personal transformation cycle
☲.Math: iteration, fixed point, cyclic group, recurrence, graph cycle, and periodic function
☲.Opics: optical resonator circulation, laser pumping-emission, and optical signal processing cycle
☲.Pedagogy: practice repetition, feedback loop, increasing task complexity, interest, and burnout cycles
☲.Psychology: sleep-wake rhythm, mood cycle, therapy session cycle, and repeated behavior pattern
☲.Psychopathology: manic-depressive cycle, panic interval, ritual repetition, seasonal relapse, and chronic course
☲.Quantum: Rabi or neutrino oscillation, repeated quantum gates, and periodic potential
☲.Sociology: social reproduction, economic cycle, generational turnover, fashion cycle, revolution and stagnation periods
☲.Training: epochs, iterations, reinforcement loops, and repeated stabilization of weights

☶.Addiction: reinforcement rule, tolerance increase, and compulsive repetition despite negative consequence
☶.ADHD: executive-function deficit logic affecting planning, organization, working memory, and emotion regulation
☶.Agency: inner value system, causal responsibility, and ethical rather than conformist reasoning
☶.Biology: regulatory cascade, gene switching, developmental Boolean network, and metabolic pathway rule
☶.Chemistry: valence, stereochemistry, Le Chatelier principle, thermodynamics, and reaction mechanism

☶.Crypto: number theory, elliptic curves, primitive properties, avalanche effect, and protocol construction rules

☶.InstitutionalEducation: bureaucratic reporting, standardization, selection, sorting, and legitimacy-by-knowledge
☶.KabbalahIching: correspondence rules, yin-yang change logic, polarity, and reflection between above and below

☶.Opics: geometrical and wave optics, Fermat principle, Maxwell equations, and image construction rules
☶.Pedagogy: didactic principle, subject ordering, grading rule, and hidden classroom power logic
☶.Psychology: learning principle, cognitive distortion, psychosocial development stage, and Gestalt perception law
☶.Psychopathology: delusional system, depressive or anxious distortion, and symptom-formation rule
☶.Quantum: superposition, uncertainty, quantum statistics, and postulates of quantum mechanics
☶.Sociology: social action theory, functionalism, conflict theory, exchange theory, and interaction rule
☶.Training: alignment constraints, safety rules, and content filters integrated into weights or added as runtime filters

☱.Addiction: brain reward system, prefrontal cortex, social context, domestic context, and object availability
☱.ADHD: prefrontal cortex, reward system, stimulation level, external structure, and deadline environment
☱.Agency: inner world, social context, and physical body as environment for volitional execution
☱.Biology: cell, cytoplasm, organelles, organism, ecosystem, and biological execution context
☱.Chemistry: solution, gas, catalyst surface, reactor, temperature, pressure, and concentration conditions
☱.Code: interpreter, virtual machine, operating system, container, cloud, and execution platform
☱.Crypto: cryptographic library, HSM, TPM, network, device, and protocol runtime

☱.Economics: market structure, institution, law, norm, and global economic system
☱.Electricity: circuit, power source, conductor, board, and electromagnetic environment
☱.HarmonicFlow: real-time performance, improvisation, and adaptive musical system
☱.InstitutionalEducation: school, university, ministry, society, and labor market as apparatus
☱.KabbalahIching: adept consciousness, ritual space, astral plane, and inner microcosm
☱.Math: formal system, computational model, Turing machine, lambda calculus, and mathematician mind
☱.Opics: vacuum, glass, nonlinear crystal, laser cavity, optical table, and fiber line
☱.Pedagogy: classroom, online course, learner brain, culture, social context, and institution norms
☱.Psychology: brain, social-cultural context, therapeutic room, and inner world
☱.Psychopathology: altered neurobiology, dysfunctional family environment, and traumatic social context
☱.Quantum: isolated or open quantum system, quantum computer, qubits, and vacuum field

△.Addiction: compulsive behavior, withdrawal symptom, tremor, social dysfunction, personality change, and visible addictive program
△.ADHD: disorganization, hyperactivity or inner restlessness, lateness, unfinished projects, impulsive speech or action
△.Agency: action chosen by the agent, visible result, accepted responsibility, reality change, and personal integrity
△.Biology: phenotype, morphogenesis, behavior, motion, and visible execution of life
△.Chemistry: product formation, precipitate, color change, gas release, and heat exchange
△.Code: executable program, running application, interface, computation result, and production deployment
△.Crypto: encrypted message, valid signature, successful authentication, functioning blockchain, and visible security
△.DissipativeMath: finite proof, working program, act of understanding, consensus shift, and resource-bounded manifestation
△.Economics: real output, employment level, inflation, market quotation, welfare, or visible crisis
△.Electricity: lamp glow, motor rotation, resistor heat, speaker sound, and functioning digital device
△.InstitutionalEducation: graduate as institutional product, performance statistics, career trajectory, and reproduced stratification
△.KabbalahIching: archetype appearing in life, consciousness shift, synchronistic event, and symbolic materialization
△.Math: proved theorem, computed result, constructed model, visualized fractal, implemented algorithm, and physical embodiment
△.Opics: image, laser beam, fiber data transmission, visible light spot, and interference pattern
△.Pedagogy: demonstrated knowledge, practiced skill, changed thinking or behavior, diploma, and certificate
△.Psychology: verbal behavior, nonverbal behavior, emotional expression, psychosomatic symptom, therapeutic change, and adaptive functioning
△.Psychopathology: hallucination, compulsion, panic attack, depressive slowing, isolation, and suffering
△.Quantum: measured outcome, interference pattern, working quantum algorithm, and macroscopic quantum effect
△.Sociology: social practice, ritual, protest, stratification, architecture, and legal change
△.Training: trained model, deployed weights, and observable inference behavior

agent_instruction: Use optics as an operator-centered projection matrix. Do not treat lenses as separate ontologies. For any domain lens, preserve ProcessLang operator identity and only vary the domain interpretation.
